about.title: About us
about.p1: We are Kazoom, an online store that brings together everything you need in one place. From housewares to electronics, fitness gear to tools, our mission is to deliver quality products with the best prices and outstanding customer service.
about.p2: We work with the best brands and offer worldwide shipping, with installment options on credit card.
about.p3: Your satisfaction is our commitment. Count on our support Monday–Friday, 8am to 6pm, for any questions or needs. It's Kazoom!

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.s1: By accessing and using the Kazoom website, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, do not use our site.
terms.s2: All prices are shown in the selected currency and include applicable taxes. We reserve the right to change prices without prior notice. Product images are illustrative and may slightly vary from the actual product.
terms.s3: By placing an order, you confirm the information provided is true and complete. We accept credit card payments. The order is only confirmed after payment approval.
terms.s4: Delivery times are estimated and start counting from payment confirmation. We offer worldwide shipping with rates calculated at checkout.
terms.s5: All content on the site, including texts, images, logos and layout, is the property of Kazoom and protected by intellectual property laws. Reproduction without prior authorization is prohibited.
terms.s6: Kazoom is not responsible for indirect damages resulting from the use of the site. We will do our best to keep the site available but do not guarantee uninterrupted access.
terms.s7: These terms are governed by the laws of the country of operation.

returns.title: Returns & Refunds Policy
returns.s1: You have up to 14 calendar days after receiving the product to request a return, with no need for justification. The product must be in its original packaging, with no signs of use.
returns.s2: If the product has a manufacturing defect, you can request an exchange or return within 30 calendar days after receipt. Send photos of the defect via WhatsApp or email to speed up the process.
returns.s3i1: Contact us by email or WhatsApp
returns.s3i2: Provide your order number and the reason for the request
returns.s3i3: Wait for shipping instructions from our team
returns.s3i4: Send the product back according to the instructions
returns.s4: After receiving and verifying the returned product, the refund will be processed within 10 business days. The amount will be refunded using the same payment method used for the purchase.
returns.s5: In case of defect or shipping error, Kazoom will cover all return shipping costs. In case of withdrawal, return shipping is the customer's responsibility.
returns.s6: Customized or made-to-order products are not eligible for withdrawal-based returns. Items with signs of use, misuse, or without original packaging may have the return refused.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1: We collect personal information you provide directly when placing an order, including: full name, email, phone, shipping address and payment data. We also automatically collect browsing data such as IP address, browser type, pages visited, and timestamps.
privacy.s2i2: Send order confirmations and shipping updates
privacy.s2i6: Comply with legal and regulatory obligations
privacy.s3: Your data may be shared with logistics partners for product delivery, payment gateways for processing transactions, and analytics tools for service improvement. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacy.s4: We use technical and organizational security measures to protect your data, including SSL/TLS encryption on all data transmissions and secure storage on protected servers.
privacy.s5: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience, remember your preferences, and analyze site traffic. You can manage cookies through your browser settings.
privacy.s6: You have the right to: access your personal data, correct incomplete or outdated data, request the deletion of unnecessary data, withdraw consent, and request data portability.
privacy.s7: To exercise your rights or clarify questions about this policy, contact us at support@kazoom.com.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.metaDesc: Get answers about delivery, payment, returns and more.
faq.a1: Delivery times range from 7 to 21 business days for international shipping. After payment confirmation, you'll receive a tracking code by email.
faq.a2: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) processed securely via Stripe. You can pay in your local currency.
faq.a3: Yes! We offer free worldwide shipping on all orders, with no minimum purchase.
faq.q4: How do I exchange or return a product?
faq.a4: You have up to 14 days after receiving the product to request a return or exchange. Contact us by email or WhatsApp informing your order number.
faq.a5: Yes, all products have a minimum 30-day warranty against manufacturing defects.
faq.q6: Is it safe to shop at Kazoom?
faq.a6: Totally safe! We use SSL encryption across the site, payments are processed by certified gateways, and we never store card data.
faq.q7: Can I shop without creating an account?
faq.a7: Yes! You can checkout without creating an account. If you prefer, you can create an account to track orders and save your data for future purchases.
faq.q8: How do I track my order?
faq.a8: After shipment, you'll receive an email with the tracking code. You can also check your account on the site, in 'My Orders'.

productFaq.a1: Yes. {{name}} is 100% original, sourced from authorized suppliers and ships with all manufacturer guarantees.
productFaq.a2: All products include a 90-day warranty against manufacturing defects, plus 7 days for return or exchange under consumer law.
productFaq.q3: How long does delivery take for {{name}}?
productFaq.a3: Standard delivery is 5–10 business days worldwide. Express options are available at checkout.
productFaq.q4: What payment methods do you accept?
productFaq.a4: We accept major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), Apple Pay, Google Pay and local payment methods depending on your region.
productFaq.a5: Yes. All payments are processed through PCI-DSS certified gateways with SSL encryption. We never store your card details.
productFaq.q6: Can I return the product if I don't like it?
productFaq.a6: Absolutely. You have 7 days from delivery to request a full refund, no questions asked.
